content.text:
All the evidence is in. Here is the result:

- All 7 builtin sub-modules (`fs`, `git`, `github`, `net`, `orbit`, `proc`, `time`) each expose a `pub fn register(registry: &mut ToolRegistry)` that directly calls `registry.register(…)` — confirmed from source.
- `crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/builder.rs` → `load_external_tools` calls `registry.register(ExternalTool {…})` on a `&mut ToolRegistry` — confirmed from source.
- `crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs` → `register_builtins` only calls the sub-module `register` functions; it does **not** itself call `ToolRegistry::register` directly.
- `crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs` only **defines** the method.
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs` and `crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs` have `register` methods on `ProviderRegistry` / `ActivityExecutorRegistry` — different types, excluded.

```json
{
  "answer": [
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/fs/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/git/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/github/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/net/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/orbit/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/proc/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/time/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/builder.rs"
  ],
  "excluded": [
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs",
    "crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs"
  ]
}
```

result:
All the evidence is in. Here is the result:

- All 7 builtin sub-modules (`fs`, `git`, `github`, `net`, `orbit`, `proc`, `time`) each expose a `pub fn register(registry: &mut ToolRegistry)` that directly calls `registry.register(…)` — confirmed from source.
- `crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/builder.rs` → `load_external_tools` calls `registry.register(ExternalTool {…})` on a `&mut ToolRegistry` — confirmed from source.
- `crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs` → `register_builtins` only calls the sub-module `register` functions; it does **not** itself call `ToolRegistry::register` directly.
- `crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs` only **defines** the method.
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs` and `crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs` have `register` methods on `ProviderRegistry` / `ActivityExecutorRegistry` — different types, excluded.

    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/github/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/net/mod.rs",
